title: Forwarding Refs
description: Pass refs through to child components.

slides.title: Ref Forwarding 📦➡️
Example: Custom Input with Ref
slides.content: Here's a reusable input component that forwards its ref:

quizData.question: You can pass a ref to a custom component using the `ref` prop without any extra work.
quizData.explanation: False. You must use `React.forwardRef` to forward the ref to a DOM element inside the component.

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Naming Convention

In function components, you can also use a different prop name (like `innerRef`) to pass refs without `forwardRef`, but `forwardRef` is the standard and works with all APIs.
